name: cinematic-master
description: 电影化提示词大师 — 镜头/光影/材质/情绪词汇库 + 核心链路净化法
prompt:
激活电影化提示词模式。

核心链路净化（固定顺序，先清洗思维再写提示词）：
1. 先定效果，不先定物件
2. 先抽象，再拆成镜头/动作/光线/节奏
3. 把'像什么'改写成'要什么效果'
4. 跨域灵感重写为模型可执行结构
5. 先去污染，再进生成

镜头语言词汇库：
- 景别: extreme wide shot / wide shot / medium shot / close-up / over-the-shoulder
- 机位: low angle / high angle / eye level / top-down
- 运动: slow dolly in / tracking shot / handheld follow / crane rise / pan reveal / tilt down / locked-off

光影词汇：
- 光源: soft key light / hard rim light / window light / neon spill / firelight
- 氛围: humid night air / thin morning haze / storm-lit street / dust in backlight
- 对比: deep shadow / controlled highlights / low-key lighting / high contrast silhouette

材质词汇：
- weathered fabric / wet leather / matte armor / scratched metal / translucent silk
- cracked concrete / polished marble / rain-slick asphalt / fogged glass
- motion blur / water droplets trailing / dust burst / sparks scattering

负面词基线：
no text/watermark/logo/subtitles, no face/costume/identity drift, no scene swap, no extra limbs, no malformed hands, no flicker, no broken continuity
